cards.header: How important is the design of the living room?
cards.author: Sabina Javadova
cards.descript1: There are many nuances that should be taken into account when choosing. Many people first renovate their home, and then start looking for furniture that matches the interior of the house. Furniture experts think that this is a wrong step, because the walls of the house are already painted or wallpapered. painted, the floor is laid in a certain color, and the color of the ceiling is chosen to match all of this. That means, the furniture to be bought should be adapted to the existing ones. But the furniture is mainly produced in more popular colors, shapes and sizes. Therefore, it is better to combine it with the renovation. let's think about the furniture.
cards.question1: What should we pay attention to and what should we prioritize when choosing a living room set?
cards.answer1: Although the furniture is chosen primarily for taste and comfort, it must be checked for functionality. For example, special attention should be paid to parts with a mechanism. If you buy a sofa and a bed with a base, first check whether it opens or closes easily. be sure to pay attention. There are different types of bases. The best ones are made of wooden or metal bars. In this type of bed, the air always circulates and the furniture lasts longer.
cards.question2: What should be the budget for the living room suite?
cards.answer2: The furniture market has furniture suitable for any budget. Their price varies depending on the material, the country of manufacture, and even the brand. Bedding sets (double bed, two nightstands, chest of drawers, chest of drawers with a mirror) start at a minimum of 2500-3000, 12000-13000 can be bought at prices of AZN and higher. The expensive ones are imported, and the relatively cheap ones are domestically produced sets with foreign materials and are mainly factory goods. Turkish-made sets average around 4,000-6,000 AZN. But local workshops also produce enough furniture. This It is possible to buy such bed sets for 1200-1500 manats.
cards.slogan1: Creativity is allowing yourself to make mistakes. Design is knowing which ones to keep.
cards.designer_about: A good choice of wood for a formal design is oak, cherry, and mahogany, while for a casual design, maple, bamboo, and pine are random choices. A good way to use lights in a room is to use 80% of the lights from above and 20% of the light from i should be free standing or wall mounted such as table lamp, art lamp, library lamps, sconces, etc. your interior and paintings.

cards.header: How should the kitchen layout be?
cards.author: Anar Aliyev
cards.descript1: Kitchen furniture can help you not only be efficient, but also help you kick back, relax and have fun while you cook. Most modern kitchens are built for maximum storage, functionality and efficiency, but not as places where you can relax. This kitchen furniture ideas are sure to turn your kitchen into a functional space that doubles as a conversation zone. They also help create areas to sit and wait until your food is cooked to perfection.
cards.question1: What should we prioritize when buying kitchen furniture?
cards.answer1: Among several kitchen furniture designs, the open kitchen style has been gaining popularity recently - with its spacious feel and airy setting, the open kitchen style is the most suitable for living here. Best suited for homes with large kitchen and dining areas, this design is simple and attractive. This type of interior has a dining area and a kitchen island, which gives you the chance to be quirky and experimental. As you can see in the picture above, you can play with the latest trends in kitchen furniture design and use different seating options that you like.
cards.question2: What colors are best for kitchen furniture?
cards.answer2: These days, people are looking for more social kitchen designs where they can interact with their family and guests while cooking. Many kitchens need efficient and quick cooking support, so some people prefer open spice racks, pans or spatulas within easy reach of the oven.
cards.slogan1: It's hard to think about design, but this not thinking can be disastrous.
cards.designer_about: If you live in an apartment, you can use stacking techniques or hang baskets to increase vertical space. From a windowsill or a thin balconyyou can use it now by planting it in suitable containers, and you can also put decorative plants on the door steps or entrances.

cards.header: What to pay attention to when buying garden furniture?
cards.author: Farid Nuriyev
cards.descript1: Getting your garden done is something you'll thank yourself for in the spring and summer. There's nothing like relaxing in some luxurious garden furniture to make an evening of outdoor living after work or a sunny weekend all the more appealing. From townhouse terraces to Get ready for an influx of outdoor space ideas from our favorite designers to island paradises. Read our guide for more helpful tips and advice.
cards.question1: What should we prioritize when buying garden furniture?
cards.answer1: Any outdoor living space can easily be transformed into a space tailored to your wants and needs. Whether you plan to sunbathe for hours on a deck chair or shade from the sun, the sky's the limit. However, whatever activity you choose, you will require you to buy some essential garden furniture. Fortunately, there are many outdoor furniture options for all types of gardens and all types of budgets. So whether you have a large garden that needs to be filled with large garden sets or a small apartment balcony that can barely hold a small garden chair, no need to worry. It's important to consider your specific requirements before rushing out and buying the cheapest option available.
cards.question2: What types of garden furniture are there?
cards.answer2: Can you leave it outside? Which garden furniture is better to buy? Wicker or rattan? How will it stand the test of time? Below you will find the answers to all these questions as we walk through different types of garden furniture materials. it's sensitive…normally. title.ru: Руководство по уходу за керамическими столешницами

text.az: Seramik stolüstü möhkəmdir, amma düzgün qulluq edin.
text.en: Ceramic tabletops are robust, but be sure to treat them right.
text.ru: Керамические столешницы прочные, но ухаживайте за ними правильно.

title.ru: Руководство по уходу за уличной мебелью

text.az: Çöl mebellərinizə ilin bütün dövrlərində baxın.

text.az: Saxlama mebellərinizə yaxşı qulluq edin ki, uzun ömürlü olsun.
text.en: Take good care of your storage furniture to ensure it lasts a long time.
text.ru: Ухаживайте за вашей мебелью для хранения, чтобы она служила долго.

text.az: Rənglənmiş və laklı səthlərinizə necə qulluq etməli olduğunuzu öyrənin.

title.ru: Руководство по уходу за металлическими частями мебели

text.az: Kiçik metal hissələr də böyük rol oynaya bilər, onlara da diqqət yetirin.
text.en: Small metal parts might have a big impact, so take care of them, too.
text.ru: Небольшие металлические части могут иметь большое значение, поэтому за ними тоже ухаживайте.

title.ru: Руководство по уходу за стульями для столовой

text.az: Stullarınıza düzgün qulluq edin ki, uzun ömürlü olsun.
text.en: Treat your chairs right for longevity.
text.ru: Ухаживайте за стульями правильно, чтобы они служили долго.
